name: Lake Naivasha Rising Water Level Response Plan
blocking_factor: NEMA and county jurisdiction overlap unresolved
notes: Lake rose 2.5m between 2013 and 2023. Inundating 8000+ ha of riparian land and lakeshore infrastructure. Response plan drafted 2021. Implementation stalled by jurisdictional dispute between WRMA NEMA and county.

name: Malewa River Riparian Enforcement
blocking_factor: Horticulture industry employs 100000+ workers — political cost is very high
notes: Riparian buffer mapped. Horticulture irrigation abstraction and infrastructure inside buffer. Industry employs over 100000 workers in Naivasha sub-county. No government has enforced riparian clearance.

name: Hell's Gate Flash Flood Early Warning
blocking_factor: KWS jurisdiction ends at park boundary — Kongoni settlement not in alert chain
notes: Flash flood warning system within Hell's Gate National Park operational. Kongoni settlement downstream not in alert chain. Inter-agency handoff between KWS and county emergency management not formalised.

name: Naivasha Town Drainage
notes: Design complete 2020. Budget diverted to Nakuru town drainage 2021. Retendered 2023. Naivasha town CBD floods in every significant rain event.

name: Lake Naivasha Catchment Integrated Management
blocking_factor: Fragmented implementation across 12 agencies with no single authority
notes: Catchment management plan adopted 2018. Implementation fragmented across 12 agencies. No single implementing authority with enforcement powers. Annual reporting shows declining compliance with abstraction limits.
